What is eTukTuk?

eTukTuk is an AI-powered, sustainable transport solution that will revolutionise transportation in developing nations and ultimately worldwide. eTukTuk is building the charging infrastructure of tomorrow, powered by the blockchain, and this presale is your chance to invest in a project that aims to change the world. Don't miss out on this exceptional opportunity to be a part of a better, sustainable future for all.

Watch Our Journey

Earn $TUK by Expanding the eTukTuk Network

HOW WE DO IT
  1. AI-Driven Efficiency: $TUK token powers AI-driven crypto advancements, optimizing routes for reduced traffic and minimal fuel consumption, promoting sustainable transport.
  2. Eco-Friendly Innovations: $TUK supports green transportation through AI research, aligning token presale efforts with environmental goals.
  3. Smart Infrastructure: $TUK tokens pioneer intelligent transport systems using AI-enhanced blockchain, advancing green initiatives in real-time.
  4. Predictive Maintenance: Our AI integration schedules interventions for prolonged vehicle life, minimizing wastage for a reliable, eco-friendly crypto token.

Investors & Partners

How To Buy and Stake

Step 1: Connect

You will need to have a web3 compatible wallet to participate in the presale.

For desktop, we suggest using Metamask browser extension, and for mobile we suggest using Trust Wallet for the smoothest user experience. clicking here.

You can use BNB, ETH, USDT or your bank card if you need to! Make sure you have enough crypto for gas as well.

Step 2: Connect

We recommend staking your tokens to immediately start earning $TUK as rewards. Once your wallet is connected, select the Buy and Stake option to start earning interest on your staked tokens today!

Staking is on the BNB Smart Chain network only for now, so we recommend buying on this chain to take advantage of staking.

Alternatively you can just buy $TUK tokens as part of the presale, and claim them once the presale is over.

eTukTuk Play-to-Earn Game

Etuktuk is bringing you a play-to-earn game based on the flagship eTukTuk vehicle. In Crazy Taxi style, you’ll whiz round the streets of Sri Lanka whilst picking up and dropping off customers who need to be somewhere fast. The quicker you drive, the more you’ll earn! You’ll be able to upgrade your eTukTuk, unlock new cities and much much more! More details on this, coming soon.

Roadmap

Phase 1

Conception

  • White Paper released
  • Sri Lanka as Launch Territory Announced
  • etuktuk unveiled at World Economic Forum, Davos
  • Launch of Rewards App: TukStation
  • Prototype eTukTuk unveiled
  • Power Staking Paper released
  • Opening of SL office
  • Opening of Singapore office
  • Capital Maharaja Group unveiled as major partner for Sri Lanka rollout

Phase 2

Presale

  • Token Sale Commences
  • Layer 2 Sidechain reveal: opBNB
  • Smart Contract Audit Completed
  • Smart Contract Deployed
  • Driver App dev starts
  • Launch of Buy and Stake feature
  • Staking contract deployed
  • Tuk Station hits 80,000 users

Phase 3

Launch

  • First Charging Stations Installed in Sri Lanka
  • Official Government launch of eTukTuk
  • Passenger App begins development
  • $TUK Token Launch on CEX
  • eTukTuk Merchandise available for sale
  • Power Staking commences
  • Prototype Charging Station unveiled
  • First production facility acquired and renovation begins

Phase 4

Growth

  • Announcement in conjunction with Sri Lankan Government
  • Production of eTukTuks in Sri Lanka begins
  • First charitable donations made to local community
  • Driver App finished
  • Target 200 Charging Points installed in Sri Lanka
  • Passenger app completion
  • Target 6000 eTukTuks on road by year end
  • Second eTukTuk Territory/Country Announced
  • First Charging Point in 2nd eTukTuk Territory/Country Installed
  • Unveil 3rd eTukTuk Country/Territory
  • Development of Second Model (last mile deliveries)
  • Install first solar charging station

FAQs

What are the $TUK token details?
$TUK is a BEP-20 token on the BNB Smart Chain with a maximum supply of 2,000,000,000 (2 billion).
The $TUK token is the native token on the blockchain that is the backbone of the eTukTuk ecosystem.
The token contract address is 0x84E03e21dA9B32555885a85b7c23e5FC123C25DD. Please do not send any funds to this token contract address, as they cannot be recovered. $TUK can currently only be purchased through the official presale at buy.tuktoken.io
What is eTukTuk?
eTukTuk is a blockchain based project for the people. eTukTuk is building the charging infrastructure of tomorrow. Powered by the blockchain, eTukTuk will power a sustainable and robust charging ecosystem for transportation networks across developing countries and beyond. The ecosystem will provide sustainable transport solutions and ensure financial inclusion in developing regions.
Why the $TUK token?
The $TUK token will power the whole eTukTuk ecosystem.
The $TUK token will provide long term rewards for holders of the $TUK token in the form of Power Staking. Moreover, it will form a payment overlay network alongside fiat transactions that will ease the barrier to entry into the eTukTuk ecosystem for those among the unbanked (i.e. no access to traditional financial services).
When is the claim and launch of $TUK token?
Claiming your $TUK tokens and the public launch of the token will happen on the same day once the presale ends and will be announced once the date is confirmed. Announcements will also be made on CEXs and DEXs that you will be able to trade $TUK on, once they are confirmed.
Should you have any further inquiries, please don't hesitate to reach out to our support team. We are here to assist you throughout this exciting journey.
How do I contact support?
To contact our support team, please email us atcontact@etuktuk.io
Our dedicated support staff will be more than happy to assist you with any questions, concerns, or inquiries you may have. We strive to provide timely and helpful responses to ensure your experience with our project is smooth and enjoyable.
Feel free to reach out to us at any time, and we look forward to providing you with excellent support and service. Thank you for choosing eTukTuk!
